'''Imperial Meats and Produce''' formerly '''Republic Meats and Produce''', was a small business located in the clouds of [[Tyed Kant]]. It was initially funded by grants from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] became the new galactic government, the company's name was changed. Imperial Meats and Produce was one of the companies that [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] were commissioned to raid and ransack from.

{{Company-stub}}
